title: periballia minuta
intro: Periballia minuta, also known as the tiny periballia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is native to India. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Periballia minuta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat wounds, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or powder, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
